body.title: Audit residual bare-script package-import fragility in lab/claudecode
body.description:
Closes out the bare-script import bug class surfaced while fixing the status-label consolidation regression. Skills/cron invoke `python3 ${CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS}/<script>.py` under SYSTEM python3 (NOT the venv), where sys.path[0] is the script's own dir and the editable install is absent — so top-level `unseen_university`/`devices` imports are unresolvable without a per-script repo-root bootstrap.

The two genuinely-broken, bare-invoked scripts (cc_queue.py, queue_view.py) are ALREADY FIXED (commits 746ce063, 14798231) with the `_REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]` bootstrap + a subprocess regression test. This ticket captures the RESIDUAL, lower-severity items found in the full sweep — none are active production breakage:

1. channel.py:52-66 / cc_inbox.py:55-66 — lazy IMAP-mirror import inside `except Exception: pass`. This is INTENDED fallback (JSONL/Postgres authoritative, IMAP is a mirror) — do NOT resurrect the import (would spin up IMAPServer().start() on every CLI call, an unwanted behavior change). The real defect is the AR-009 violation: the swallow is a bare `pass` with no log at the interface crossing. Fix = one-line `log.debug(...)` in the except, not an import change. Also channel.py has a DEAD legacy sys.path insert pointing at a nonexistent `parents[3]/dev/src/unseen_university` path — remove it.
2. book_learner.py:66, cc_task_listener.py:133, reading_campaign.py:602 — import devices/unseen_university but are NOT bare-invoked by any current skill/cron/shim (book_learner's only hits are stale VSCode logs). If any becomes bare-invoked, add the bootstrap. Low priority; documented so a future grep doesn't re-discover from scratch.
3. code_indexer.py — VERIFIED SELF-HEALING under bare invocation (sweep_python_files inserts repo_root before the devices.nanny import; empirical run gave inserted=5380 errors=0). No action; recorded so it isn't re-flagged.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/channel.py, lab/claudecode/cc_inbox.py (AR-009 log + dead-path removal); book_learner.py / cc_task_listener.py / reading_campaign.py (note-only unless they become bare-invoked).
**Design rules:** AR-009 interface-crossing logging; no-sqlite (n/a); portability (rejected the systemic .pth/--user fix as machine-global + un-versioned).
**Scope boundary:** IN: AR-009 one-line logs in the two swallow sites, remove channel.py dead legacy sys.path insert. OUT: do NOT enable CLI->IMAP mirroring (deliberate, separately-ticketed, tested change); do NOT mechanically bootstrap channel/cc_inbox (the standard fix wouldn't even resolve their top-level `bus.imap_server` import).
**Test plan:** Extend the existing tests/test_web_queue.py bare-script subprocess pattern to assert channel.py + cc_inbox.py run bare under system python3 with no traceback in stderr; assert the AR-009 log line is emitted when the IMAP import fails. No test for code_indexer (already covered by empirical verification + its own bootstrap).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
[error] PATTERN-004: Flat-File Registry (Atomic Write): The skeleton must never depend on Postgres — skeleto — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-004 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-004: Flat-File Registry (Atomic Write))
…and 37 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Fixed 4 bare-swallow AR-009 violations in channel.py + cc_inbox.py (IMAP init + send; bare pass → print stderr). Removed dead legacy sys.path insert in channel.py. Added missing sys import in cc_inbox. book_learner/cc_task_listener/reading_campaign noted as not-bare-invoked (no action). code_indexer verified self-healing (no action). Commit f46908ac.
